events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Kaiser Permanente San Francisco for client 1126. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: diabetic, cardiovascular. Allergies: none. Sodium ceiling 650 mg/meal, carbs 40–55 g/meal. Prefers Mediterranean; dislikes cilantro. Cooking ability: stovetop. 5 meals/week, zone Sunset.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Falafel Plate with Hummus
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 57 g outside 40–55 g range.

events.title: Rejected: Grilled Chicken Garden Salad
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 39 g outside 40–55 g range.

events.title: Matched: Baked Cod with Herbed Couscous
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 351/650 mg ✓, carbs 41 g (target 40–55) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Tabbouleh with Grilled Chicken
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 378/650 mg ✓, carbs 40 g (target 40–55) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Hearty Lentil Soup with Vegetables
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 410/650 mg ✓, carbs 47 g (target 40–55) ✓.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1126 added to route R-SUNS-1 (Sunset), delivery 2026-07-21, window 10:00–12:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1126: 5 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
